message:
✨ Add authorGithub field to all kubestellar-authored items (#83)

Add authorGithub: "clubanderson" to all 18 items authored by kubestellar.
This enables the console's new AuthorBadge component to link authors to
their GitHub profiles and show contribution stats on hover.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
